\tzpentry{ID11415}{Redshift Radius Ratio}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
Cosmological redshift is the ratio of present radius to emission radius in the breathing model.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
1+z=\frac{R_{0}}{R_{e}}
